name: Book Sale Revenue
description: Income from quarterly used-book sale at Welles-Turner Memorial Library

name: Membership Dues Income
description: Annual membership dues collected from Friends of the Welles-Turner Memorial Library members

name: Donation Income
description: Charitable donations from community supporters and local donors

name: Grant Income
description: Grants awarded to the Friends of the Library from local foundations

name: Friends of the Library Checking
description: Webster Bank checking account for Friends of the Welles-Turner Memorial Library

name: Friends of the Library Savings
description: Webster Bank savings account for Friends of the Welles-Turner Memorial Library reserve fund

name: Supplies Expense
description: Supplies purchased for book sale events — tables, price stickers, bags, cashboxes

name: Printing Expense
description: Flyers, posters, and programs printed for the used-book sale and library events

name: Venue and Setup Expense
description: Costs for setting up book sale space at the library or Glastonbury Community Center

name: Book Acquisition Expense
description: Purchase of books and media to supplement donated inventory for the sale

name: Postage and Mailing Expense
description: Postage for member newsletters and event announcements

name: Refreshments Expense
description: Light refreshments provided at book club meetings and Friends of the Library gatherings

name: Bank Fees
description: Monthly service charges and transaction fees from Webster Bank

name: Accounts Receivable
description: Pledged donations and outstanding membership dues owed to Friends of the Library

name: Accounts Payable
description: Outstanding vendor bills owed by Friends of the Welles-Turner Memorial Library

name: Net Assets — Unrestricted
description: Accumulated unrestricted net assets of the Friends of the Library

name: Net Assets — Restricted
description: Donor-restricted funds designated for library collection purchases

name: Technology and Website Expense
description: Website hosting and software subscriptions for the Friends of the Library

name: Miscellaneous Income
description: Incidental income not classified under book sales, dues, or donations

name: Insurance Expense
description: Liability insurance for Friends of the Library events — policy lapsed 2025
